description_long: This object is a small potted plant featuring three large, broad, heart-shaped green leaves attached to slender, upright stems. The leaves have a matte, slightly muted green color and are arranged in a way that gives the plant a full, bushy appearance. The stems emerge from a compact, brown pot that has a simple, slightly faceted design, resembling a rustic terracotta or clay vessel. The pot is unadorned, with no visible patterns or decorations, and has a slightly tapered shape. The plant appears healthy and robust, with the leaves spreading outward and upward. This type of potted plant is commonly used as a decorative element in urban environments, such as on windowsills, desks, or small tables.
description: A small, bushy potted plant with three large, heart-shaped green leaves in a simple brown pot. The plant has upright stems and a rustic, unadorned container.
description_view_0: Front view showing two overlapping large green leaves and the top of the brown pot, with stems visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the pot's faceted shape and the spread of the leaves, with one leaf more prominent.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the undersides of the leaves and the stems emerging from the pot.
description_view_3: Angled view showing all three leaves and the full profile of the pot, emphasizing the plant's bushy form.
